Name: JIGGLER_BASE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the configuration of jiggle bones within FLVER models.

Fields.Name: Control Type
Fields.Description: The setup type used for setting up the jiggler.

Fields.Name: Calculation Type
Fields.Description: The calculation type to use with the jiggler.

Fields.Name: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to apply the jiggler to. Only valid if the control type is set to Dummy Polygon.

Fields.Name: Control Bone Name
Fields.Description: The bone name to apply the jiggler to. Only valid if the control type is set to Skeleton.

Fields.Name: Axis: X
Fields.Description: The axis to treat as the X-axis (so that it does not overlap with other axes).

Fields.Name: Axis: Y
Fields.Description: The axis to treat as the Y-axis (so that it does not overlap with other axes).

Fields.Name: Axis: Z
Fields.Description: The axis to treat as the Z-axis (so that it does not overlap with other axes).

Fields.Name: Follow Root Bone
Fields.Description: If ON, the jiggler will follow the root bone.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum angle for the X-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation: X-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum angle for the X-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Minimum Angle
Fields.Description: The minimum angle for the Y-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Y-Axis - Maximum Angle
Fields.Description: The maximum angle for the Y-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation Behavior ID
Fields.Description: The rotation behavior parameter to use.

Fields.Name: Movement Behavior ID
Fields.Description: The movement behavior parameter to use.

Fields.Name: Position: X-Axis - Minimum Offset
Fields.Description: The minimum position offset for the X-axis.

Fields.Name: Position: X-Axis - Maximum Offset
Fields.Description: The maximum position offset for the X-axis.

Fields.Name: Position: Y-Axis - Minimum Offset
Fields.Description: The minimum position offset for the Y-axis.

Fields.Name: Position: Y-Axis - Maximum Offset
Fields.Description: The maximum position offset for the Y-axis.

Fields.Name: Position: Z-Axis - Minimum Offset
Fields.Description: The minimum position offset for the Z-axis.

Fields.Name: Position: Z-Axis - Maximum Offset
Fields.Description: The maximum position offset for the Z-axis.

Fields.Name: Ground Attach ID
Fields.Description: The parameter ID to use when the jiggler is attached to the ground.

Fields.Name: Target Bone Rate ID
Fields.Description: The parameter ID to use for determining the percentage rate from a specified joint.

Fields.Name: [Follow Root] Spine Follow %: Rotation
Fields.Description: Used if Follow Root Bone is ON. The tracking rate to the new position after the rotation of the root bone for the spine.

Fields.Name: [Follow Root] Spine Follow %: Position
Fields.Description: Used if Follow Root Bone is ON. The tracking rate to the new position after the movement of the root bone for the spine.

Fields.Name: [Follow Root] Spine Position Offset: X
Fields.Description: Used if Follow Root Bone is ON. The follow position offset on the X-axis for the spine when movement of the root bone occurs.

Fields.Name: [Follow Root] Spine Position Offset: Y
Fields.Description: Used if Follow Root Bone is ON. The follow position offset on the Y-axis for the spine when movement of the root bone occurs.

Fields.Name: [Follow Root] Spine Position Offset: Z
Fields.Description: Used if Follow Root Bone is ON. The follow position offset on the Z-axis for the spine when movement of the root bone occurs.
